requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Safety Testing — Mandatory for Lithium Battery Imports via Port Banjul (Sea Freight, IMDG)
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3运输安全测试——经班珠尔港（海运、IMDG）进口锂电池强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3運輸安全測試——經班珠爾港（海運、IMDG）進口鋰電池強制要求

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1 Altitude Simulation, T2 Thermal Test, T3 Vibration, T4 Shock, T5 External Short Circuit, T6 Impact/Crush, T7 Overcharge, T8 Forced Discharge) for lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries of all sizes, including cells, modules, and battery packs used in stationary BESS. Since January 1, 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation that must accompany lithium battery shipments under international transport regulations. Gambia imports virtually all goods — including BESS equipment — by sea via the Port of Banjul (Banjul Port Authority), which operates under IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) for dangerous goods handling. The IMDG Code mandates UN 38.3 compliance for all lithium battery sea freight. BESS cells and modules exported from China to Gambia via sea freight must be covered by a valid UN 38.3 Test Summary from an accredited laboratory before shipment. Gambia is landlocked from the north by Senegal and has no direct air cargo hub for large BESS shipments — sea freight via Port Banjul is the primary logistics route.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了所有尺寸锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池（包括固定式BESS中使用的电芯、模组和电池包）的8项强制运输安全测试（T1高度模拟、T2热测试、T3振动、T4冲击、T5外部短路、T6冲击/挤压、T7过充电、T8强制放电）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3测试摘要是国际运输法规下锂电池货物必须随附的强制文件。冈比亚几乎所有货物——包括BESS设备——均经由班珠尔港（班珠尔港务局）通过海运进口，班珠尔港依据IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）处理危险货物。IMDG规则要求所有锂电池海运货物遵守UN 38.3。从中国经海运出口至冈比亚的BESS电芯和模组须在出货前由认可实验室出具有效的UN 38.3测试摘要。冈比亚北部被塞内加尔包围，无大型BESS货物直达空运枢纽——经班珠尔港的海运是主要物流路线。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了所有尺寸鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池（包括固定式BESS中使用的電芯、模組和電池包）的8項強制運輸安全測試（T1高度模擬、T2熱測試、T3振動、T4衝擊、T5外部短路、T6衝擊/擠壓、T7過充電、T8強制放電）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3測試摘要是國際運輸法規下鋰電池貨物必須隨附的強制文件。甘比亞幾乎所有貨物——包括BESS設備——均經由班珠爾港（班珠爾港務局）通過海運進口，班珠爾港依據IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）處理危險貨物。IMDG規則要求所有鋰電池海運貨物遵守UN 38.3。從中國經海運出口至甘比亞的BESS電芯和模組須在出貨前由認可實驗室出具有效的UN 38.3測試摘要。甘比亞北部被塞內加爾包圍，無大型BESS貨物直達空運樞紐——經班珠爾港的海運是主要物流路線。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — applies to all sea freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules via Port Banjul
UN Model Regulations, 7th revised edition (2021) — Test Summary requirement in force since January 1, 2020
Banjul Port Authority (BPA) — port authority applying IMDG Code for dangerous goods handling at Port of Banjul, Gambia

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited testing laboratories such as UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV, or CAICT. The UN 38.3 Test Summary (required since January 1, 2020) must cover the specific cell or battery type being shipped. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary from an accredited laboratory is acceptable for Gambia imports via Port Banjul under the IMDG Code — the key gap is ensuring the test summary covers the specific cell model, chemistry, capacity, and configuration of the BESS units being shipped, and that it is maintained current with any cell design changes.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可测试实验室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3测试摘要须涵盖所运输的特定电芯或电池类型。来自认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要可依据IMDG规则用于经班珠尔港进口至冈比亚的货物——主要差距在于确保测试摘要涵盖所运输BESS单元的特定电芯型号、化学体系、容量和配置，且随电芯设计变更保持最新状态。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可測試實驗室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3測試摘要須涵蓋所運輸的特定電芯或電池類型。來自認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要可依據IMDG規則用於經班珠爾港進口至甘比亞的貨物——主要差距在於確保測試摘要涵蓋所運輸BESS單元的特定電芯型號、化學體系、容量和配置，且隨電芯設計變更保持最新狀態。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — acceptable for IMDG-governed sea freight via Port Banjul if the test summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped

gap.en: The gap is documentation scope and currency, not standard equivalence — UN 38.3 is a universal requirement and Chinese-origin test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for Gambia-bound sea freight under the IMDG Code. Exporters should verify: (a) the UN 38.3 test summary covers the specific cell model (including chemistry, capacity, and format) being exported to Gambia — a summary for a different cell model or capacity is not transferable; (b) the test summary is from a currently accredited laboratory; (c) any cell design change since the original UN 38.3 testing triggers a reassessment requirement; (d) module-level and battery-pack-level assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment if they constitute a battery as defined under international transport regulations; (e) Port Banjul DG handling capacity — confirm with the freight forwarder that Port Banjul's dangerous-goods handling procedures and container inspection capacity are adequate for the shipment volume, and that a licensed DG agent is appointed at the Banjul port of entry.
gap.zh: 差距在于文件范围和时效性，而非标准等效性——UN 38.3是普遍要求，来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可依据IMDG规则用于运往冈比亚的海运货物。出口商应核实：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要涵盖出口至冈比亚的特定电芯型号（包括化学体系、容量和规格）——针对不同电芯型号或容量的测试摘要不可转用；（b）测试摘要来自当前仍获认可的实验室；（c）自最初UN 38.3测试以来的任何电芯设计变更均触发重新评估要求；（d）若模组和电池包组件按国际运输法规定义构成电池，可能需要单独进行UN 38.3评估；（e）班珠尔港危险货物处理能力——与货运代理确认班珠尔港危险货物处理程序和集装箱检查能力是否足以应对货物量，并确认在班珠尔入境港指定了持牌危险货物代理。
gap.zht: 差距在於文件範圍和時效性，而非標準等效性——UN 38.3是普遍要求，來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可依據IMDG規則用於運往甘比亞的海運貨物。出口商應核實：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要涵蓋出口至甘比亞的特定電芯型號（包括化學體系、容量和規格）——針對不同電芯型號或容量的測試摘要不可轉用；（b）測試摘要來自當前仍獲認可的實驗室；（c）自最初UN 38.3測試以來的任何電芯設計變更均觸發重新評估要求；（d）若模組和電池包組件按國際運輸法規定義構成電池，可能需要單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（e）班珠爾港危險貨物處理能力——與貨運代理確認班珠爾港危險貨物處理程序和集裝箱檢查能力是否足以應對貨物量，並確認在班珠爾入境港指定了持牌危險貨物代理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under IMDG Code for all lithium battery sea freight imports to Gambia via Port Banjul — applies universally with no Gambia-specific exemption
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport compliance is universal — a Chinese-origin test summary from an accredited laboratory is accepted for Gambia sea freight shipments via Port Banjul under the IMDG Code, provided it covers the specific cell model and is current. The primary risk is scope mismatch (wrong cell model or capacity in the summary) or an outdated summary after a cell design change. Verify test summary coverage and currency before each shipment. Appoint a licensed dangerous-goods freight forwarder familiar with Port Banjul IMDG handling procedures to confirm packaging, marking, and documentation requirements for BESS cell and module shipments to Gambia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3运输合规是普遍要求——来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可依据IMDG规则用于经班珠尔港运往冈比亚的海运货物，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。主要风险在于范围不匹配（测试摘要中电芯型号或容量有误）或电芯设计变更后测试摘要过期。请在每次出货前核实测试摘要的覆盖范围和时效性。请聘请熟悉班珠尔港IMDG处理程序的持牌危险品货运代理，确认向冈比亚运输BESS电芯和模组货物的包装、标识和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3運輸合規是普遍要求——來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可依據IMDG規則用於經班珠爾港運往甘比亞的海運貨物，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。主要風險在於範圍不匹配（測試摘要中電芯型號或容量有誤）或電芯設計變更後測試摘要過期。請在每次出貨前核實測試摘要的覆蓋範圍和時效性。請聘請熟悉班珠爾港IMDG處理程序的持牌危險品貨運代理，確認向甘比亞運輸BESS電芯和模組貨物的包裝、標識和文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Customs and Import Documentation — Gambia BESS Equipment Import Duties, HS Codes, and Donor-Project Exemptions
requirement_topic.zh: 海关和进口文件——冈比亚BESS设备进口关税、HS编码及捐助方项目豁免
requirement_topic.zht: 海關和進口文件——甘比亞BESS設備進口關稅、HS編碼及捐助方項目豁免

summary.en: BESS equipment imported into Gambia is subject to Gambia Revenue Authority (GRA) customs clearance via Port Banjul. Applicable import duties and taxes depend on the HS code classification of the BESS components. Lithium-ion batteries (HS 8507.60) are subject to Gambia's ECOWAS Common External Tariff (CET), which generally applies a 20% import duty for Category 4 goods (finished consumer and industrial goods) — though machinery and equipment for specific productive use (Category 2, 5% duty) or capital goods (Category 1, 0% duty) classifications may apply depending on the end use and project context. For donor-funded BESS projects (ECOWAS ROGEP, World Bank, AfDB), equipment imported under an approved donor-project framework typically qualifies for partial or full import duty exemption under Gambia's bilateral donor-agreement provisions — however this exemption must be documented and pre-approved by GRA as part of the project financial close, and cannot be assumed. Import documentation required for BESS equipment typically includes: commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin (China), UN 38.3 Test Summary, and TGSB conformity certificate (if required). Confirm the current GRA import duty rate and applicable HS code for each BESS component type before freight cost estimation.
summary.zh: 进口至冈比亚的BESS设备须经冈比亚税务局（GRA）通过班珠尔港完成海关清关。适用进口关税和税款取决于BESS组件的HS编码分类。锂离子电池（HS 8507.60）适用冈比亚ECOWAS共同对外关税（CET），第四类商品（成品消费品和工业品）一般适用20%进口关税——但根据最终用途和项目背景，可能适用机械和设备用于特定生产用途（第二类，5%关税）或资本品（第一类，0%关税）的分类。对于捐助方资助的BESS项目（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界银行、非洲开发银行），依据经批准的捐助方项目框架进口的设备通常根据冈比亚双边捐助方协议条款享受部分或全额进口关税豁免——但此豁免须在项目财务关闭时由GRA记录并预先批准，不可想当然。BESS设备通常所需进口文件包括：商业发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证书（中国）、UN 38.3测试摘要及TGSB合格证书（如有要求）。在运费估算前，请确认每类BESS组件的现行GRA进口关税税率和适用HS编码。
summary.zht: 進口至甘比亞的BESS設備須經甘比亞稅務局（GRA）通過班珠爾港完成海關清關。適用進口關稅和稅款取決於BESS組件的HS編碼分類。鋰離子電池（HS 8507.60）適用甘比亞ECOWAS共同對外關稅（CET），第四類商品（成品消費品和工業品）一般適用20%進口關稅——但根據最終用途和項目背景，可能適用機械和設備用於特定生產用途（第二類，5%關稅）或資本品（第一類，0%關稅）的分類。對於捐助方資助的BESS項目（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界銀行、非洲開發銀行），依據經批准的捐助方項目框架進口的設備通常根據甘比亞雙邊捐助方協議條款享受部分或全額進口關稅豁免——但此豁免須在項目財務關閉時由GRA記錄並預先批准，不可想當然。BESS設備通常所需進口文件包括：商業發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證書（中國）、UN 38.3測試摘要及TGSB合格證書（如有要求）。在運費估算前，請確認每類BESS組件的現行GRA進口關稅稅率和適用HS編碼。

standards_or_laws: Gambia Revenue Authority (GRA) — customs authority for all imports via Port Banjul; verify current HS code classification and import duty rates for BESS components directly with GRA
ECOWAS Common External Tariff (CET) — applied by Gambia as an ECOWAS member state; lithium-ion batteries HS 8507.60 — verify applicable duty band with GRA
Donor-project import duty exemption provisions — ECOWAS ROGEP, World Bank, AfDB bilateral agreement provisions; must be pre-approved by GRA as part of project financial close
TGSB Certificate of Conformity — required import documentation if TGSB mandates CoC for BESS (unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify with TGSB)

summary.en: Chinese exporters shipping BESS equipment to Gambia must comply with standard Chinese export documentation requirements including export customs declaration, export licence (if applicable for large lithium battery systems), certificate of origin (China), and dangerous goods documentation. China does not have Gambia-specific export controls for standard commercial BESS equipment. The China-side documentation burden is lower than the import-side requirements in Gambia. Chinese exporters must ensure that UN 38.3 test summaries and Chinese origin certificates are included in the shipping package to support Port Banjul customs clearance and TGSB CoC requirements.
summary.zh: 向冈比亚发运BESS设备的中国出口商须遵守标准中国出口文件要求，包括出口报关单、出口许可证（如适用于大型锂电池系统）、原产地证书（中国）及危险货物文件。中国对标准商业BESS设备不设冈比亚专项出口管制。中国出口方的文件负担低于冈比亚进口方要求。中国出口商须确保UN 38.3测试摘要和中国原产地证书纳入运输包裹，以支持班珠尔港海关清关和TGSB CoC要求。
summary.zht: 向甘比亞發運BESS設備的中國出口商須遵守標準中國出口文件要求，包括出口報關單、出口許可證（如適用於大型鋰電池系統）、原產地證書（中國）及危險貨物文件。中國對標準商業BESS設備不設甘比亞專項出口管制。中國出口方的文件負擔低於甘比亞進口方要求。中國出口商須確保UN 38.3測試摘要和中國原產地證書納入運輸包裹，以支持班珠爾港海關清關和TGSB CoC要求。

standards_or_laws: China Export Customs — standard export declaration and DG documentation requirements for lithium battery shipments
Certificate of Origin (China) — issued by China Council for the Promotion of International Trade (CCPIT) or local Customs authority; required for Gambia import clearance

gap.en: Key import documentation gaps for China-to-Gambia BESS shipments: (a) HS code classification — confirm the correct HS code for each BESS component type (cells, modules, PCS, enclosure) with GRA to determine applicable import duty rate; (b) donor-project duty exemption — if the project qualifies, obtain GRA pre-approval documentation before shipment to avoid detention at Port Banjul; (c) TGSB CoC — if TGSB requires a CoC for BESS import, include it in the shipping package; (d) dangerous goods declaration — ensure UN 38.3 Test Summary and IMDG Class 9 dangerous goods declaration are included in the bill of lading and customs documentation; (e) Port Banjul DG handling — appoint a licensed DG freight forwarder at Port Banjul; confirm that the port can handle the volume and configuration of BESS containers before freight booking.
gap.zh: 中国至冈比亚BESS货物进口文件主要差距：（a）HS编码分类——与GRA确认每类BESS组件（电芯、模组、PCS、机壳）的正确HS编码，确定适用进口关税税率；（b）捐助方项目关税豁免——若项目符合条件，在出货前取得GRA预先批准文件，避免货物在班珠尔港被扣押；（c）TGSB CoC——若TGSB要求BESS进口持有CoC，须将其纳入运输包裹；（d）危险货物申报——确保UN 38.3测试摘要和IMDG第9类危险货物申报纳入提单和海关文件；（e）班珠尔港危险货物处理——在班珠尔港指定持牌危险品货运代理；在预订货运前确认港口能够处理BESS集装箱的数量和配置。
gap.zht: 中國至甘比亞BESS貨物進口文件主要差距：（a）HS編碼分類——與GRA確認每類BESS組件（電芯、模組、PCS、機殼）的正確HS編碼，確定適用進口關稅稅率；（b）捐助方項目關稅豁免——若項目符合條件，在出貨前取得GRA預先批准文件，避免貨物在班珠爾港被扣押；（c）TGSB CoC——若TGSB要求BESS進口持有CoC，須將其納入運輸包裹；（d）危險貨物申報——確保UN 38.3測試摘要和IMDG第9類危險貨物申報納入提單和海關文件；（e）班珠爾港危險貨物處理——在班珠爾港指定持牌危險品貨運代理；在預訂貨運前確認港口能夠處理BESS集裝箱的數量和配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GRA import customs clearance and IMDG DG documentation required for all BESS imports via Port Banjul; import duty rate and donor-project exemption status must be confirmed with GRA before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — standard Chinese export customs declaration and DG documentation required for all lithium battery export shipments from China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gambia customs clearance for BESS imports via Port Banjul requires correct HS code classification, IMDG-compliant dangerous goods documentation (including UN 38.3 Test Summary), certificate of origin, and TGSB CoC if mandated. Import duty rates under ECOWAS CET apply unless donor-project duty exemption is pre-approved by GRA. Appoint a licensed DG freight forwarder at Port Banjul. Confirm duty rates, HS codes, and exemption eligibility with GRA before finalising freight cost estimates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 经班珠尔港进口BESS货物须满足以下冈比亚海关清关要求：正确的HS编码分类、符合IMDG的危险货物文件（含UN 38.3测试摘要）、原产地证书，及TGSB CoC（如有要求）。适用ECOWAS CET进口关税税率，除非GRA预先批准捐助方项目关税豁免。请在班珠尔港指定持牌危险品货运代理。在最终确定运费估算前，请向GRA确认关税税率、HS编码和豁免资格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 經班珠爾港進口BESS貨物須滿足以下甘比亞海關清關要求：正確的HS編碼分類、符合IMDG的危險貨物文件（含UN 38.3測試摘要）、原產地證書，及TGSB CoC（如有要求）。適用ECOWAS CET進口關稅稅率，除非GRA預先批准捐助方項目關稅豁免。請在班珠爾港指定持牌危險品貨運代理。在最終確定運費估算前，請向GRA確認關稅稅率、HS編碼和豁免資格。
